scripts.build: tsup && tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist && node dist/scripts/write-style-outputs.js --package
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.generate:styles: tsup && tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist && node dist/scripts/write-style-outputs.js --package --registry
